tests.test_name: Adding more than the maximum files shows a warning toast and rejects the file
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation
tests.description: Verifies that attempting to add a file beyond the maximum queue limit is blocked and the user is notified with a warning.

test_coverage.verification_step: Fill queue to maximum and attempt to add another file
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system prevents adding files beyond the maximum allowed limit
The user receives a visible notification explaining the file limit has been reached

test_coverage.verification_step: Queue file count does not increase
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The rejected file is not added to the queue

tests.test_name: Adding two files when one slot remains toasts and accepts only the first
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation
tests.description: Verifies that when only one queue slot remains and two files are added simultaneously, the system accepts the first file, rejects the second, and notifies the user.

test_coverage.verification_step: Fill queue to 19 files and attempt to add 2 at once
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system handles partial acceptance when the batch addition would exceed the limit
The user is informed that the file limit was hit during the batch upload
Exactly one of the two files was accepted, filling the queue to its maximum

tests.test_name: A file with no test cases shows an error badge at selection time
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation
tests.description: Verifies that a BDD file containing no test cases is immediately flagged with an error badge and a descriptive message when added to the queue.

test_coverage.verification_step: Add a BDD fixture file with no scenarios
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system detects that the file contains no test cases at the point of selection

test_coverage.verification_step: File row shows an error badge
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user can clearly see which file in the queue is invalid

test_coverage.verification_step: Error message mentions 'No test cases found'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user receives a clear explanation of why the file is invalid

tests.test_name: A file in the wrong format shows a warning badge at selection time
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation
tests.description: Verifies that adding a file whose format does not match the selected analysis format results in a warning badge on that file's queue entry.

test_coverage.verification_step: Select BDD format and add a Playwright spec file
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system detects a mismatch between the selected analysis format and the file's actual format

test_coverage.verification_step: File row shows a warning badge
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user is alerted that the file may not be compatible with the chosen analysis format

tests.test_name: A file that exceeds the size limit shows an error badge at selection time
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation
tests.description: Verifies that a file exceeding the allowed size limit is immediately flagged with an error badge and a descriptive message when added to the queue.

test_coverage.verification_step: Add an oversized file to the queue
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system detects that the file exceeds the permitted size at the point of selection

test_coverage.verification_step: File row shows an error badge
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user can clearly see which file in the queue is too large
The user receives a clear explanation of why the file was rejected

tests.test_name: A valid file shows an ok badge
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation
tests.description: Verifies that a well-formed BDD file matching the selected analysis format is accepted and shown with a positive status badge in the queue.

test_coverage.verification_step: Select BDD format and add a valid BDD fixture file
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system correctly identifies the file as valid for the chosen analysis format

test_coverage.verification_step: File row shows an ok badge
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user receives clear confirmation that the file is ready for analysis
